exercises.title: Syndrome Calculator
exercises.description: Build a syndrome calculator for a given error and code.
tasks: Input: stabilizer generators and error (Pauli string)
Calculate syndrome bit for each stabilizer
Output: syndrome vector
Test with various errors on Steane and surface codes
Verify that equivalent errors give same syndrome
hints: Syndrome bit = 1 if error anticommutes with stabilizer
Count overlapping positions with different Paulis
X anticommutes with Z, Y anticommutes with both

exercises.title: Coset Enumerator
exercises.description: Enumerate error cosets for a small code.
tasks: For [[5,1,3]] code, list all stabilizer generators
Generate stabilizer group (16 elements)
Find all cosets of stabilizer group
Identify which cosets correspond to logical errors
Map syndromes to their cosets
hints: Total Pauli group has 4^n elements (up to phase)

exercises.title: Decoder Latency Analyzer
exercises.description: Analyze timing constraints for real-time decoding.
tasks: Input: code distance, syndrome round time, decoder speed
Calculate maximum allowed latency
Determine if decoder can meet real-time constraint
Plot latency vs code distance for different decoders
Identify crossover points

exercises.title: Lookup Table Decoder
exercises.description: Implement a simple lookup table decoder for a small code.
tasks: For [[7,1,3]] Steane code, enumerate all syndromes
For each syndrome, find minimum weight error
Build lookup table: syndrome → correction
Test decoder on random single-qubit errors
Measure success rate
exercises.expectedOutput: Lookup table decoder for Steane code
hints: Some syndromes may have multiple min-weight errors
